comments.author: Steve
comments.text:
Don't worry about Undo for now. In fact, remove the button for now so that I don't accidentally hit it.

You are correct to notice how intimately Undo semantics will affect replay. Punt for now.

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: I suppressed them during my implementation. You can suppress them as well in V1. It's an important boundary, so we will re-visit this decision for sure.

comments.author: Steve
comments.text: Yup! Your implementation of the port + some of our design principles will lead to some easy wins like this! If the win is easy, take advantage of it!
